title: Filing of Application. An application for issuance of SRA shall be filed at
content: 4 least three (3) calendar days prior to the date of the activity with any of the following DMW 5 offices: 6 7 a. DMW Central Office; 8 9 b. DMW Regional Office under whose area of jurisdiction the agency is located; or 10 11 c. DMW Regional Office under whose area of jurisdiction the special recruitment 12 activity will be conducted. 13 14
